caption: A man wearing a grey, tall, textured wig, a white dress shirt, a red and white patterned bow tie, and tan suspenders sits in a podcast studio. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. The background is a wall decorated with numerous small, framed photographs and some hanging apparel. A white logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is overlaid on the left side of the screen, and the text "BOSS TALK 101" appears on the right. As the sequence progresses, the man continues speaking, his mouth moving and his head shifting slightly. In the final frame, he begins to raise his hand into the frame, gesturing as he talks.
